select_preferred_language: Select the language you prefer to use
search_hint: I have 20 JOD.. where should I go?

ai_no_messages: No messages yet. Ask me anything!
ai_prompt_prefix: You are 'Drop AI', a smart assistant for the Drop deals app. Respond in a friendly Jordanian dialect. User question:
ai_fallback_response: I'm here, how can I help you?
ai_sugg_budget: I have 10 JOD.. where should I go?
notification_body: Al-Quds Restaurant has a 20% discount, hurry up! 🥙
faq_a1: Simply search for deals nearby on the map, or use Drop AI to find the best places within your budget.
faq_a2: Premium gives you access to exclusive VIP deals, early access to sales, and advanced AI guide features without ads.
faq_q3: How do I use an exclusive coupon?
faq_a3: Go to 'Exclusive Coupons' on the home screen, select a deal, and show the generated code to the cashier.
faq_q4: Can I list my own store on Drop?
faq_a4: Yes! Use the 'Store Registration' feature in the login screen. It costs only 5 JOD/month to reach thousands of savers.
faq_a5: Add your favorite brands like Zara or Nike. We'll send you an instant notification as soon as they drop a sale anywhere in Jordan.
store_signup_subtitle: Join Drop and grow your business
no_deals_yet: You haven't published any deals yet. Start now! 🚀
no_search_results: I couldn't find anything matching your search.. try something else! 🔍
notifications_coming_soon: Notifications feature coming soon, stay tuned! 🔔
no_notifications: No notifications for now, we'll let you know as soon as a deal drops nearby! 🔔

show_at_cashier: Show the app at the cashier and get your discount immediately! 🎉

brand_tracking_desc: Add brands you love, and we'll send you an instant notification when a sale starts anywhere in Jordan! 🔔

address_subtitle: Where should we drop your deals?
about_app_desc_fallback: Drop is your ultimate companion to find the best deals and sales in Jordan. We use AI to help you save money every day.
problems_solved_fallback: We solve the problem of missing out on big sales and help users find affordable places within their specific budget.

dark_mode_premium_desc: Dark Mode is a Premium-only feature. Upgrade now to save your battery and eyes!
